name: Sibanye Stillwater Limited
description: Sibanye-Stillwater is a multinational mining and metals processing group with a diverse portfolio of operations, projects, and investments across five continents. The company is one of the world's largest primary producers of platinum, palladium, and rhodium and is a top-tier gold producer. It has also diversified into the battery metals sector, investing in lithium, nickel, and copper projects. Sibanye-Stillwater is committed to delivering value to all stakeholders while contributing to a sustainable future through the responsible production of metals essential for a low-carbon economy.
